name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI aesthetic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools generate slides that look templated, bloated, or visually inconsistent, undermining credibility in professional settings. Chronicle 2.0 addresses this by giving users AI-assisted creation with design controls that preserve a clean, bespoke look. Teams waste time fixing AI-generated slop; Chronicle aims to eliminate that rework entirely.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks that look hand-crafted rather than auto-generated
Creating client-facing proposals and reports with consistent brand styling
Producing internal team presentations and project updates at speed
Turning raw notes or documents into structured, visually coherent slide decks
